name: Buttermilk Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yeast; (or 1 1/2 tsp)             1/4 cup Warm water
3 cups Bread flour                         1 cup Cheddar, sharp, cubed
1 teaspoon Baking powder                     1/2 cup Blue cheese
1 teaspoon Salt                                1 cup Green chilies, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Have all ingredients at room temperature, except water.
2. Place the ingredients into a pan in the order listed below.
3. Set the machine to the White Bread setting.
4. Check whether the dough is too wet or dry during the knead cycle.
5. Correct with 1 tablespoon more of water or flour if necessary.
6. This is a dense loaf and I like it best toasted.
7. For adaptations using sourdough starter, seed bread loaf, or Potato Loaf Bread, please contact Judy Garnett (PJXG05A) at JUDY/NC.
